title: Discordhook
description: a neoforge mod to integrate your discord server with your minecraft server using a discord webhook
body:
### This mod is for sending messages from your minecraft server to your discord server using a discord webhook
###

## Features
- Does not require inviting any bot to your server to use
- Runs fully on server side
- Compatible with other mods including discord integration
- Death & Join/leave notifications
- Ability to filter/hide messages of specific players
- Option to disable/enable the mod while server is running

## Usage
1. Add the mod jar file to your server mods folder.
2. The mod will create a config file when you start your server it can be found in config directory, modify it and add your discord webhook url there.
3. Use "/discordhook reload" command to apply the changes
4. if you want to disable the mod or apply a message filter both can be done the same way you do step 3 and 4
